title: RealizedSavings
description: Append-only records of ACTUAL savings realized on posted purchases, tied to a merchant and budget category. Provided by Module 6 to Tasks, Pay, and Inbox. The recorded saving is the ACTUAL posted figure (with a divergence flag if it differs from the coupon's expected value), never the optimistic expected one (SC-SH-006). All amounts integer CAD cents. Writes are idempotent on source_event_id (FR-X-003): a replayed purchase-posted event records at most once.

profile_id.description: Owning profile; cross-member reads are authZ-checked server-side (threat model IDOR).

source_event_id.description: Idempotency key (purchase-posted event id). UNIQUE: a replayed event does NOT double-record (Constitution IV, FR-X-003).

budget_category.description: Canonical BudgetState category the saving is framed against.

coupon_recommendation_id.description: The CouponRecommendation whose use produced this saving, if any.

expected_saving.description: The coupon's expected CAD saving at recommendation time (for divergence comparison only).

actual_saving.description: The ACTUAL CAD saving realized on the posted purchase (integer cents). This is the authoritative figure; expected_saving is reference only.

diverged.description: true iff actual_saving differs from expected_saving (partial apply, item out of stock, etc.). When true, the ACTUAL figure is recorded and the divergence is surfaced (SC-SH-006).

recorded_at.description: UTC instant the realized saving was recorded; immutable (append-only audit semantics, FR-X-007).

freshness.description: Freshness of the purchase-posted source (TransactionStream) the saving was derived from.
